name: Phad Thai
recipeIngredient: 4 cm square firm bean curd cake
100 grams chicken breasts without skin, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok. Cut bean curd into thin strips and fry until crisp on the surface. Remove and set aside.
2. Fry chicken until it changes color. Remove and set aside.
3. Fry noodles until expanded, crisp, and white. Remove and drain.
4. Pour off 2 tablespoons of oil and stir-fry prawns, spring onions, and garlic for 1 1/2 minutes. Remove and set aside.
5. Pour beaten eggs into the pan and scramble in the wok. Remove when firm and wipe out the wok.
6. Pour sugar, lime juice, vinegar, water, and fish sauce into the wok and bring to a boil. Add chili powder and cook for 1 1/2 minutes. Add fried noodles and toss in the sauce until completely coated.
7. Add bean curd, chicken, prawns, onions, garlic, and eggs. Heat gently through and stir until hot for about 3 minutes.
8. Pile the noodles into a serving dish and garnish with sprouts and garlic chives.
